task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into JFrog Artifactory as 'admin'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JFrog Artifactory web interface is visible in a browser, and the UI indicates the 'admin' user is logged in (typically visible in the top-right corner of the screen).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the Administration settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Administration module is open, typically indicated by a highlighted gear icon in the left sidebar or an 'Administration' page header.
In the Artifactory settings, the 'Offline Mode' checkbox or toggle is checked or switched to the 'on' position.
In the Security settings, the 'Allow Anonymous Access' checkbox or toggle is unchecked or switched to the 'off' position.

task_completion.description: Verify the System Message is set to the required alert text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The System Message text box contains exactly 'SECURITY ALERT: System in Offline Lockdown' and the message display is enabled.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser GUI to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the JFrog Artifactory web interface in a browser, not terminal commands (like curl) or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the real Artifactory instance.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar should show the URL http://localhost:8082 or a similar local address, rather than a text editor or unrelated site.

integrity.description: Verify changes were made via the standard UI forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no browser developer tools (Inspect Element) open to fake the UI changes.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Artifactory instance is located at http://localhost:8082. The agent must log in as 'admin' with password 'password'. The required configuration changes are: Offline Mode must be enabled, Anonymous Access must be disabled, and the System Message must be exactly 'SECURITY ALERT: System in Offline Lockdown'.
